title: Energy: Asking the Wrong Question
summary: Presents a criticism of the book 'The Skeptical Environmentalist: Measuring the Real State of the World,' by Bjorn Lomborg. Discussion of the idea that the world's energy and environmental resources are being depleted; Discussion of petroleum resources; Experience of the author in studying environmentalism.
body: Abstract Presents a criticism of the book 'The Skeptical Environmentalist: Measuring the Real State of the World,' by Bjorn Lomborg. Discussion of the idea that the world's energy and environmental resources are being depleted; Discussion of petroleum resources; Experience of the author in studying environmentalism.
